header: Retheme the whole site before the meeting ends
subheadline: Theme preset, density, corner radius, container width, and fonts are plain TYPO3 site settings. Change one dropdown in the backend and every element on every page follows — no rebuild, no deployment window, no developer ticket.

dashboard_image.title: Desiderio theme site settings
dashboard_image.alternative: TYPO3 site settings module showing the Desiderio theme category with preset, density, and radius options.
dashboard_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
